channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the UK
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the UK — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The East Palace — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · Just released — verdict soon — A man who walks the spirit world and a court lady who hears the dead enter the East Palace by the king's orders — can they unravel its dark secrets?

item.title: Heartstopper Forever — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — It's a new school year for the Truham-Higgs gang. As Nick and Charlie's relationship deepens, their thoughts turn to life after the last bell rings.

item.title: Desire — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — Lucero’s life appears immaculate: a wealthy household, a devoted husband, and two children who embody the promise of a perfect family.

item.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 7.7 · Must watch — Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a…

item.title: Lucky — Apple TV
item.description: Apple TV · English · ★ 6.6 · Worth a watch — When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must…

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Agent Kim Reactivated — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Korean · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.9 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, Alice seeks solace with his remaining family — descendants of a leading researcher on demonic possession.

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Young Washington — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 8.1 · Must watch — Before he led a nation, George Washington was a young soldier thrown into a global conflict. With alliances crumbling and war closing in, he must choose who to…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.8 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — HBO Max Amazon Channel
item.description: HBO Max Amazon Channel · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — When their plan to book a show at the Rivoli goes horribly wrong, Matt and Jay accidentally travel back to the year 2008.
